title: Phalangium caeruleum
taxonomy: Phalangium caeruleum belongs to the family of whip scorpions, specifically within the order Schizomida. It is classified as a species of whip scorpion in the genus Phalangium. Within the classification, Phalangium caeruleum is further categorized as an arachnid, which is a group of eight-legged arthropods. This classification places Phalangium caeruleum within the larger group of arachnids, which includes spiders and scorpions. The precise classification of Phalangium caeruleum highlights its unique position within the arachnid family tree.
